name: Hydra Lair
description:
You have entered a large lair with bones strewn about the ground.  You
notice the source of these as you come face to face with a rather large 
Hydra.  It growls at you before it attacks.

exits.description: You see a small stone building with a wooden door.
An iron door blocks your entrance into a large stone building.

extra_descriptions.description: The door is thick, made from a knotted and twisted greyish wood.
The door is fashioned from many iron plates and set deep into the stone wall.
